title: cyclosorus austrophilippinus
intro: Cyclosorus austrophilippinus, also known as the Austrophilippine fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae, characterized by its distinctive frond shape and habitat in tropical forests. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The Austrophilippine fern is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and processed into teas, infusions, or poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
